steps.title: Use the practical application
steps.content: The team used the fact that some metals' internal magnetic fields change under stress. They showed that those changes can be measured from a distance to reveal stress in underground pipes.

steps.title: Reject nonuse verbs
steps.content: Choice A means proposed, but the team demonstrated a method. Choice B means dismissed, which is opposite the context. Choice C means changed the definition. The needed word means put a phenomenon to practical use. The answer is D.
